target: Review Games Bug Fixes - Word Search drag-select and Crossword auto-advance direction
summary: BACKEND: 16/16 tests PASSED. API endpoint /api/unified/lessons/stage_1_unit_01_lesson_04/activity/micro_game_vocab returns valid review games (crossword, word_search, board_game) with proper items. FRONTEND: Build compiles successfully. Code review confirms both bug fixes are correctly implemented. Frontend UI testing limited due to authentication requirement for Unified Learning lesson pages.

API_REVIEW_GAMES.evidence: API returns valid game data with items containing word, definition, emoji

implementation.getCellsBetween: Lines 74-89 - calculates straight line between start and end points

WORD_SEARCH_DRAG_SELECT.evidence: Code correctly implements drag-select mechanism with pointer events

WORD_SEARCH_FULL_NAMES.evidence: API returns full word names (e.g., 'student', 'teacher', 'morning'), component displays w.word.toLowerCase() (line 219)

implementation.set_flag_during_advance: Lines 245-250: isAutoAdvancing.current = true before focus(), reset after 20ms

CROSSWORD_AUTO_ADVANCE_FIX.evidence: Code correctly prevents direction switching at intersections during auto-advance

components.WordSearch: Line 28: if (!words?.length) return { grid, placed }; Line 160: if (!items?.length) return null
components.Crossword: Line 184: safeItems = items?.length ? items : []; Lines 326-330: shows 'No words available' message

FRONTEND_BUILD.evidence: yarn build completed successfully with no errors

tests: Landing page loads without white screen - PASSED
playwright_results.note: Full UI testing of Word Search and Crossword components requires authentication to access Unified Learning lesson pages

critical_code_review_comments: WordSearch.js correctly implements drag-select with pointer events (pointerDown, pointerEnter, pointerUp)
getCellsBetween() properly validates straight lines (horizontal, vertical, diagonal only)
Crossword.js isAutoAdvancing ref correctly prevents direction switching at intersections
Both components have proper null/empty array guards to prevent crashes
Word names are displayed in full (not truncated) using w.word.toLowerCase()

test_credentials.note: admin@ieltsace.com credentials from iteration 66 returned 'Invalid email or password'. Unified Learning lesson pages require authentication.

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing unified learning content.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 verified bug fixes for Word Search (drag-select mechanism) and Crossword (auto-advance direction fix). Backend API tests all pass. Frontend code review confirms correct implementation. To fully test the UI components, valid authentication credentials are needed to access /unified/lesson/stage_1_unit_01_lesson_04 page.

mocked_api.note: All APIs use real MongoDB queries

original_issues: Word Search: words not being accepted when found, truncated word names
Crossword: auto-advance switches direction from down to across at intersections
fixes_verified: Word Search: REWRITTEN with drag-select mechanism using pointer events
Crossword: isAutoAdvancing ref flag prevents direction change during auto-advance
bug_fix_summary.verification_method: Code review + API testing (UI testing limited by auth requirement)
